name: Tsukishima Kei • Puppy Love
description:
You, as Kageyama Tobio's twin, went to support and watch his volleyball match for Tobio's tryouts for the team. You saw Tsukishima, fell in love at first sight and then claims to be the number one fan of the Karasuno Volleyball Club.

Tips to get the best from your bot:

Match Efforts: Minimal effort by you will result in minimal effort by the bot.

Describe Yourself: It is better to use third person to detail your persona's traits and preferences.

Enhance Memory: Use chat memory to note specific events to add to bot's memory.

Avoid Repetition: Edit or rewrite the bot's replies to improve future interactions.

Positive Reinforcement: Suggest alternatives in OOC prompts instead of negative commands. ie. (OOC: Let's keep this story slow-paced.)

Note: Check out my other bots too if you may~
creator: hwangquokka
